titleStmt.title: SII 39.189: original edition by K. Karuppiah
No. 189. (A.R. No. 189 of 1916.) TIRUPPUKKUḺI, CONJEEVERAM TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. VIJAYARAGHAVAPERUMĀḶ TEMPLE-ON THE SAME WALL TRIBHUVAṈACHAKRAVARTIN SUNDARAPĀṆḌYA DĒVA-18TH YEAR.

summary.p: Unfinished. This is a counterpart of the above inscription and refers to several shares of land in the village given to the temple, by the assembly of Kaṭṭanūr alias Uttamachōḻachatūrvēdimaṅgaḷam.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī tribhuvaṉac cakkaravattikaḷ sundarapāṇḍyadevaṟku yāṇṭu 10 8 puraṭṭāti mātattoru nāḷ jayaṅkoṇṭa coḻa maṇṭalattu tāmaṟkoṭṭattu tāmaṟnāṭṭuc citrameḻit tiruppuṭkuḻi nāyaṉār vijayarāghavap perumāḷ tiruviṭaiyāṭṭam kaṭṭaṉūrāṉa Uttamacoḻac caturvvetimaṅkalattu mahāsabhaiyom
Innāyaṉār śrī paṇṭārattārkku Eṅkaḷ kāṇiyāṉa Ikkaṭṭaṉūril varadarājabhaṭṭaṉ Uḷḷiṭṭār paṅku 1(1/2)m Allāḷapaṭṭaṉ Uḷḷiṭṭār paṅku 1(1/2)m mutupaṭṭaṉ Aṉucam Uṭpaṭa varatarājaṉpaṭṭaṉ paṅku
mukkālil kuṇṭūr nārāyaṇapaṭṭaṉ Akamuṭaiyāḷ Āyiṉa yum tiruppuṭkuḻiyum strīdhaṉamāka kuṭuttapaṅku kāl nīkki nīkki paṅku Araiyil muṉiaṅśamāy Abhāvattil Ivaḷ piḷḷai varantaruvārum porerum Iḷaiyārutumāy Ivarkaḷil tiruvaṭiccānta varantaruvāropātiyum Iḷaiyār Opātiyum Uṭpaṭa Ippoṟeṟṟiṉa pakkaḷ paṇam nūṟṟai
mpatu kuṭuttuk koṇṭa paṅku kālum tiruppuṭkuḻiyum Āḻvārum tāmarile cila veḷḷāḷarkku taṅkaḷ Opāti viṟṟomeṉṟu piramāṇam paṇṇikkuṭuttu ciṟitu paṇamum paṟṟi Avarkaḷum maṟittuppokaiyil tāmaṟ Ūravar namporeṟṟiṉ tiruviṭaiyāṭṭa Ūrumāy namuṭaiya tiruvārātaṉamumāṉa nāṭṭukkoyilil tiruviṭaiyāṭṭa Ūrile brāmmaṇar pakkal kāṇi ko
ḷḷakkaṭavomalla Avarkaḷ koṇṭupoṉa paṇattai śrī paṇṭārāttār tantu tirunāmattukkāṇiyāka pirāmāṇam paṇṇik koḷḷuṅko ḷeṉkaiyil Ittiruṭpukkuḻi makaṉ varantaruvārai Iṭuvittu piramāṇam Eḻuti Eḻuttum Iṭuvittu meleḻuttum tāṅkaḷe Iṭṭut tirukkaiyil Inta tiruppuṭkuḻi Aṅśattukku vilaippaṭi paṇattil tāmarūravaṟku kuṭuttapaṇam Eḻu
ttaiñcum Ivaṉ kaiyil kuṭuttapaṇam Eḻupattaiñcum Āka paṇam nūṟṟaimpatum kuṭuttukkoṇṭa paṅku kālum Āṟāvamutupaṭṭaṉ Aṅśam Uṭpaṭa tirukkurukaipirāṉ Aṅśamāṉa paṅku mukkāl Itil Ivaḷ piḷḷai varataṉ Opāti paṅku kālum Ivaṉ Abhāvattil Ivaṉ Akamuṭaiyāḷ Āṇṭavaṉ cāṉimuṉi makaṉ poṟeṟṟai mutukaṇṇāka koṇṭu piramāṇam paṇṇik ku
ṭuttu koṇṭa paṇam Aṟupattaiñcum tāmaṟ Ūravarkku Ivaṉ Akamuṭaiyāḷ varataṉ kāṇiviṟṟuk koṇṭa paṇamāyk kuṭutta paṇam patiṉeḻum Āka paṇam Eṇpattiraṇṭum Ivaṉ Akamuṭaiyāḷ varatarkku naṉṟāka tirukkaimalarile Utakapurvvemāka dāṉakuṭutta paṇam Aṟupatteṭṭum Ākappaṇam nūṟṟaimpatukku koṇṭa paṅku kāl nikki paṅku Araiyil muṉṉāḷ tāmarūṟavar
ku Āḻvārum tiruppuṭkuḻiyum piramāṇam paṇṇik kuṭuttuk koṇṭa paṇattil Opāti paṇam Eḻupattaiñcum tāmarūravarkkuk kuṭukka veṇṭukaiyil Ivaṉ makaṉ tirukkuṟukaippirāṉai Iṭuvittu cīpaṇṭārattile paṇam vāṅkik kuṭuppittup piramāṇam paṇṇik kuṭutta paṅku Araikkāl nīkki paṅku kāle Araikkālil Āḻvār Opāti paṅku mūṉṟu mā mukkāṇiyum
Ivaṉ makaṉ tirukkuṟukaipirāṉ piramāṇam paṇṇittarak kuṭutta paṇam nūṟṟerupattaiñcum Āka Utakapurvvem Uṭpaṭa paṇam muṉṉūṟṟu nāṟpatuṅ kuṭuttuk koṇṭa paṅku Araiye mākāṇiyum Āka varatarājapaṭṭar pātiyiṟ koṇṭapaṅku Oṉṟe mākāṇikku Utakapurvvam Uṭpaṭak kuṭutta paṇam Aṟunūṟṟi nāṟpatum Aruḷāḷapaṭṭaṉ Uḷḷiṭṭār paṅku Oṉṟaraiyil Āḷumpirāṉ paṭṭaṉ Amśamā
y Ivaṉ Uṭaṉ piṟanta komaḷam peruvaḷḷiyat tiruṅkaṇṭi periyakoyil nampikku vāṭkaipaṭukaiyil Ivarukku strīdhanamākak kuṭutta paṅku Araiyum Ivaḷ Abhāvattil Ivaḷ piḷḷaikaḷ nampippiḷḷaiyum viṟṟārum pramāṇam paṇṇiṉa paṇam muṉṉūṟṟil Oreṟṟukku Utakapurvvamāka dāṉam kuṭutta paṇam Irunūṟu nīkki kuṭutta paṇam nūṟum Āka paṇam muṉṉūṟṟu
kkuk koṇṭa paṅku Araiyum Attikkuṭi Āṇṭāṉum ciṅkarum Amśamāy Ivarkaḷ Abhāvattil Ikkuṭi Aruḷāḷapaṭṭaṉ periya perumāḷ Uḷḷiṭṭār bramāṇam paṇṇiṉa paṇam muṉṉūṟṟil tirukkaimalaril Udakapurvvamāka dāṉaṅ kuṭutta paṇam Irunūṟum Ivaṉ kaiyil kuṭutta paṇam nūṟum Ākappaṇam muṉṉūṟṟukku koṇṭa paṅku Araiyum Ākappaṅku Oṉṟu nī
kki tiruppukkuḻi paṭṭarum Attiyūrum paṇam paḻakiyārum tampipaṭṭarum periyaperumāḷum paṅku Arai periyaperumāḷ Opāti Amśamāy vicayakaṇṭakopālatevaṟkā Añcā Ivaṉ pramāṇam paṇṇikkuṭutta paṅku māvukku vilaippaṭi koṭutta paṇam Aṟupatu Āka Aruḷāḷapaṭṭaṉ Uḷḷiṭṭār pātiyil koṇṭa paṅku Oṉṟe Iraṇṭu māvukku Utakapurvvam
Uṭpaṭa kuṭutta paṇam Aṟunūṟṟaṟupatum Āka koṇṭa paṅku Iraṇṭe mūṉṟu mākkāṇikku Utakapurvvam Uṭpaṭak kuṭutta paṇam Āyirattu muṉṉūru Ippaṇam Āyirattu muṉnūṟṟukkum Ippaṅku Iraṇṭe mūṉṟumākkāṇiyāl vanta nārpārk kellaikkuṭpaṭṭa nañcai nilamum puṉcai nilamum maṉaippaṭappaiyum menokkiṉa maramum kiṇokkiṉa
kiṇaṟum Erikkāl Āṟṟukkāl Uṭpaṭṭa Aṉaittukkāṇi prāptikaḷum Ikkāṇi viḻukkāṭṭile koḷḷakkaṭavatāka paṇṭārattile Innāḷkaḷile Ippaṇam Āyirattu muṉnūṟum kaikkoṇṭu tirunāmattu kāṇiyāka viṟṟu vilaipramāṇam paṇṇik kuṭuttom Ivvūr
kaṭavatāka Ippaṭi sammatittu tirunāmattu kāṇiyāka viṟṟu vilaipramāṇam paṇṇik kuṭuttom tiruppukkuḻi nāyaṉār cipaṇṭārattārkku Iṉṉāyaṉār tiruviṭaiyāṭṭam kaṭṭanūrāṉa Uttamacoḻacaturvvetimaṅkalattu mahāsabhaiyom Ippaṭikku Allāḷapaṭṭaṉ periyaperumāḷ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikki varadarājabhaṭṭasya Ippaṭikki camaiñca jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻaveḷāṉ
kañcaṉūruṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu
Digital edition of SII 39.189 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
